title: Change Request
description: Beads-first CR workflow: plan -> plan_approval -> implement -> review -> review_approval -> ci -> merge -> deploy -> acceptance

steps.title: Plan
steps.prompt: Run `make beads-init` to attach this checkout to the shared Beads backend, then run `bd prime` to load the repo workflow. Analyze the request and produce a concrete plan. Put clarifying questions in this Change Request via `bd comments add`. If questions are required, set outcome=needs_human.

steps.title: Implement
steps.prompt: Run `bd mol current` to confirm the active step, implement the approved plan, run `make verify-fast` after each small slice and `make verify` before completion, then create/push a branch and open a PR. Link the PR URL and verification results back into the Change Request with `bd comments add`.

steps.title: Agent review
steps.prompt: Run Codex in reviewer mode against the diff. Record an explicit decision in the Change Request and summarize open risks. Create separate Beads tasks only for actionable findings, then hand off to `review_approval`.

steps.title: Merge
steps.prompt: Reconfirm that `review_approval` is closed in Beads by a human, then merge the PR and post the merge result in the Change Request. Treat this as the code-review approval gate in Beads, without requiring a GitHub PR review approval.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.prompt: Deploy the change to the demo host, post the URL, and capture any notes the human needs for acceptance.
